summary: Complete testing of Chamados SGC Plus module. All backend APIs and frontend UI flows working correctly. 12/12 pytest tests passed. Full CRUD operations verified via UI.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - existing known issue, non-blocking
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 form sections present: Dados do Chamado, Informações do Curso, Dados da Empresa, Período do Curso, Documentos e Requisitos, Controle Interno

New SGC Plus fields properly implemented: codigo_curso, nome_curso, turno, periodo_letivo, quantidade_vagas, modalidade, forma_pagamento, cont, requisito_acesso, empresa_nome/contato/email/telefone, data_inicio/fim_curso, documentos_obrigatorios
data-testid attributes present on key elements (novo-chamado-btn, input-numero-ticket, salvar-chamado-btn, chamado-{ticket})
seed_data_creation: Created test chamados via API (TEST_CACCM*) and UI (UITEST001)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chamados SGC module fully tested. 3 chamados exist in DB: CACCM260000001 (original), TEST_CACCM* (API test), UITEST001 (UI test). All CRUD operations, status changes, and interactions work correctly.

api_get_dashboard.notes: Returns KPIs: total_abertos, criticos, sla_critico, fechados_hoje, por_status

api_create_chamado.notes: Creates chamado with all SGC Plus fields

api_get_chamado_details.notes: Returns chamado with andamentos, interacoes, esforco

api_update_status.notes: Updates status and creates andamento entry

api_add_esforco.notes: Registers effort hours and updates SLA

ui_page_load.notes: Page loads with dashboard KPIs and chamados list

ui_novo_chamado_modal.notes: Modal opens with all 6 sections, all fields present

ui_create_chamado.notes: Form submission creates chamado, list updates automatically

ui_chamado_details.notes: Details modal shows info, SLA, status buttons, andamentos, interacoes

ui_change_status.notes: Status change works, andamento created, list updates
